info.title: Rotector API
info.description: Official Rotector API for looking up flag status of Roblox users and groups, and Discord user connections.

tags.name: Roblox Users
tags.description: Lookup flag status for Roblox users

tags.name: Roblox Groups
tags.description: Lookup flag status for Roblox groups

tags.name: Discord Users
tags.description: Lookup Discord user connections and server memberships

tags.name: Reference
tags.description:
## Flag Types

| Value | Name | Safe to action | Description |
|-------|------|----------------|-------------|
| 0 | Unflagged | No | No violations detected |
| 1 | Flagged | Yes | System-detected violations with high accuracy |
| 2 | Confirmed | Yes | Violations manually verified by a moderator |
| 3 | Queued | No | Submitted for review, not an inappropriate user |
| 5 | Mixed | At your discretion | Some inappropriate activity but insufficient evidence |
| 6 | Past Offender | No | Previously flagged but has since cleared violations |

> **Warning:** Do not treat all non-zero flag types as inappropriate. Types 0, 3, and 6 are not actionable. Only types 1 and 2 should be actioned automatically.

## Verification Sources

Discord and Roblox connection lookups include a `sources` array indicating how the link was detected.

| Value | Name |
|-------|------|
| 0 | Bloxlink |
| 1 | RoVer |
| 2 | Discord Profile |

Older records may have an empty `sources` array as source tracking was not present in earlier versions.

## Authentication

API keys provide elevated rate limits and queue quotas. Include your key in the `X-Auth-Token` header:

```
X-Auth-Token: your-api-key
```

Bearer format is also accepted:

```
X-Auth-Token: Bearer your-api-key
```

API key holders get ~40% faster average response times on lookup endpoints. API keys are optional as all endpoints work without one, just at lower rate limits.

## Rate Limiting

| Tier | Limit | Window |
|------|-------|--------|
| Standard | 50 requests | 10 seconds |
| API Key | 200 requests | 10 seconds |

Batch endpoints count as multiple requests towards your rate limit (1 request per 25 IDs). All responses include rate limit headers:

- `X-RateLimit-Limit` – Maximum requests allowed in window
- `X-RateLimit-Remaining` – Requests remaining in current window
- `X-RateLimit-Reset` – Unix timestamp when window resets
- `Retry-After` – Seconds until window resets (429 responses only)

get.description: Returns the safety flag status for a single Roblox user.

schema.description: Set to 'true' to exclude detailed reasons

reasons.description: Detailed violation analysis keyed by reason type

confidence.description: Confidence score for this specific reason (0.0-1.0)

evidence.description: Array of evidence strings, or null if not available

get.summary: Get user flag status (flag status only)
get.description: Returns the numeric flag type for a single Roblox user as plain text.

post.description: Check multiple users in a single request. Maximum 100 users per batch. Response is keyed by user ID.

ids.description: Array of Roblox IDs to lookup (max 100)

excludeInfo.description: Exclude detailed reason messages and evidence

evidence.description: Array of evidence strings, or null if not available

get.description: Returns a paginated list of flagged users in a group. Uses cursor-based pagination.

schema.description: Filter by membership status: 'true' for active, 'false' for inactive, omit for all

isActive.description: Whether the user is an active group member

totalCount.description: Total number of tracked users in the group

anyOf.description: Total number of tracked users in the group
Cursor for the next page of results

get.description: Returns tracked server memberships, linked Roblox accounts, and transitively connected alt accounts for a Discord user.

servers.description: Tracked servers the user is a member of

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when membership was last updated

firstSeenAt.description: Unix timestamp when member was first observed

anyOf.description: Unix timestamp when member was first observed

isTase.description: Whether this is a TASE (Trading and Selling Everything) server

inGracePeriod.description: Whether this member is in a grace period

detectedAt.description: Unix timestamp when connection was detected

anyOf.description: Unix timestamp when connection was detected

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when connection was last updated

anyOf.description: Unix timestamp when connection was last updated

altAccounts.description: Other Roblox accounts transitively linked through shared Discord accounts

detectedAt.description: Unix timestamp when connection was detected

anyOf.description: Unix timestamp when connection was detected

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when connection was last updated

anyOf.description: Unix timestamp when connection was last updated

ids.description: Array of Discord user IDs to lookup (max 100)

get.summary: Get Discord accounts for Roblox user
get.description: Returns linked Discord accounts and their tracked server memberships for a Roblox user. Only returns results for users that exist in our database.

detectedAt.description: Unix timestamp when connection was detected

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when connection was last updated

servers.description: Tracked servers this Discord account is a member of

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when membership was last updated

firstSeenAt.description: Unix timestamp when member was first observed

anyOf.description: Unix timestamp when member was first observed

isTase.description: Whether this is a TASE (Trading and Selling Everything) server

inGracePeriod.description: Whether this member is in a grace period

altAccounts.description: Other Roblox accounts linked to the same Discord accounts as this user

detectedAt.description: Unix timestamp when connection was detected

anyOf.description: Unix timestamp when connection was detected

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp when connection was last updated
